site_name: Kibaha (Yombo Health Centre, Kibaha district, Coastal region)
location_notes: Kibaha district located ~100 km west of Dar es Salaam; coordinates represent Kibaha town centroid. Site described as low malaria transmission area (<10% parasite prevalence in 2017 national survey).
time_notes: Study conducted between April and October 2016; enrollment ranged from April to September 2016. Midpoint of April 1 to October 31 is July 15, 2016. All samples collected at day 0 (enrollment) during this window.

site_name: Mkuzi (Mkuzi Health Centre, Muheza district, Tanga region)
location_notes: Muheza district in northeastern Tanzania; coordinates represent Muheza town centroid. Site described as low malaria transmission area (parasite prevalence <5% in 2017 national survey).
time_notes: Study conducted between April and October 2016; enrollment ranged from April to September 2016. Midpoint of April 1 to October 31 is July 15, 2016. All samples collected at day 0 (enrollment) during this window.

site_name: Mlimba (Mlimba Health Centre, Kilombero district, Morogoro region)
location_notes: Kilombero district in Morogoro region. Historically high transmission area (parasite prevalence ~70% and EIR >300 in 1990s); recently declined to low transmission (<10% in 2017) due to interventions. Extensively studied under Ifakara Health Institute demographic surveillance system.
time_notes: Study conducted between April and October 2016; enrollment ranged from April to September 2016. Midpoint of April 1 to October 31 is July 15, 2016. All samples collected at day 0 (enrollment) during this window.

site_name: Ujiji (Ujiji Health Centre, Kigoma urban district, Kigoma region)
location_notes: Ujiji is on the eastern shores of Lake Tanganyika in northwestern Tanzania. Parasite prevalence increased from 19.6% (2007) to 38.1% (2016) to 24.4% (2017), highest in country at that time. Coordinates represent Ujiji town location.
time_notes: Study conducted between April and October 2016; enrollment ranged from April to September 2016. Midpoint of April 1 to October 31 is July 15, 2016. All samples collected at day 0 (enrollment) during this window.
